changes.new_value: Monday through Friday, 8 AM to 5 PM Eastern, Saturday (9 AM to 12 PM Eastern for emergencies only)

summary: Updated account_005 configuration to reflect changes in business hours, emergency routing rules, callback times, integration constraints, and required fields for caller info. The changes include adding Saturday availability for emergency inspections, replacing Tom Bradley with Sandra Okafor as primary on-call contact, reducing callback time from 15 minutes to 10 minutes, switching from ServiceTrade to Zuper platform, and adding building occupancy type as a required field.
